message:
fix(codex): tolerate missing Content-Type header in streaming response

Codex API returns HTTP 200 with no Content-Type header for SSE streams.
Instead of requiring text/event-stream, only reject when Content-Type IS
present and indicates a non-streaming type. Also accept application/x-ndjson.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
